2605.13643.title: Prefix Teach, Suffix Fade: Local Teachability Collapse in Strong-to-Weak On-Policy Distillation
2605.13643.paper_summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student model on its own rollouts using dense feedback from a stronger teacher. Prior literature suggests that, provided teacher feedback is available, supervising the full sequence of response tokens should monotonically improve performance. However, we demonstrate that this assumption sometimes fails to hold in strong-to-weak OPD settings. While later segments of a generated trajectory may still exhibit a non-zero teacher-student advantage, they frequently lack the local contrast that makes dense feedback effective for prioritizing student learning. We term this failure mode local teachability collapse. The resulting principle is straightforward: supervision should concentrate on trajectory regions where the teacher's feedback remains discriminative, rather than uniformly covering the entire response. We operationalize this principle through a trajectory-specific release rule. This rule measures the teacher's margin over the student's top-$K$ candidate set, aggregates this margin across NLTK-tokenized sentence segments, and truncates dense OPD supervision upon detecting a BIC-style downward change point. Experimental results across strong-to-weak distillation tasks using the Qwen3 model family indicate that this release rule consistently outperforms standard full-trajectory OPD across five in-domain benchmarks at various student scales. Furthermore, compared to baseline distillation methods, our approach better preserves model capabilities on out-of-domain task. These results suggest that effective strong-to-weak OPD requires evaluating not only the availability of teacher guidance but also its local utility, ensuring that the generated feedback remains teachable.
2605.13643.paper_summary_zh: 在政策蒸餾（OPD）中，學生模型在其自身的回合上進行訓練，並使用來自更強教師的密集反饋。先前的文獻表明，只要有教師反饋，監督整個回應標記序列應該會單調地提高性能。然而，我們證明這一假設在強到弱的 OPD 設置中有時並不成立。雖然生成軌跡的後段可能仍然顯示出非零的教師-學生優勢，但它們經常缺乏使密集反饋對優先考慮學生學習有效的局部對比。我們將這種失效模式稱為局部可教性崩潰。由此產生的原則很簡單：監督應集中在教師反饋仍然具有區分性的軌跡區域，而不是均勻覆蓋整個回應。我們通過特定於軌跡的釋放規則來操作化這一原則。這條規則測量教師在學生的前 $K$ 候選集上的邊際，並在 NLTK 分詞的句子段落中聚合這一邊際，並在檢測到 BIC 風格的向下變化點時截斷密集的 OPD 監督。在使用 Qwen3 模型系列的強到弱蒸餾任務中的實驗結果表明，這一釋放規則在五個內域基準測試中，在不同學生規模下始終優於標準的全軌跡 OPD。此外，與基線蒸餾方法相比，我們的方法在跨域任務上更好地保留了模型能力。這些結果表明，有效的強到弱 OPD 不僅需要評估教師指導的可用性，還需要評估其局部效用，確保生成的反饋保持可教性。
2605.13643.author: Kaiyuan Liu et.al.
2605.13643.authors: Kaiyuan Liu, Ziyuan Zhuang, Yang Bai, Bing Wang, Rongxiang Weng, Jieping Ye
